creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On Mon, 14 Aug 2000 08:51:57 MST, johan@FreeBSD.ORG wrote:

> State-Changed-From-To: closed->open
> State-Changed-By: johan
> State-Changed-When: Mon Aug 14 08:51:24 PDT 2000
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Reopened

I don't get this PR at all.  Surely the originator just needs to use
an up-to-date MAKEDEV to create the mixer device?  I realize that the
sound driver in RELENG_3 is luigi's old code, while the driver in
RELENG_4 and HEAD is cg's, but the PR makes it sound like the originator
is expecting the device node and symbolic link for the mixer to
maigcally appear on demand.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
